notableEvents.label: Brent Rooker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker grounds into a double play, third baseman Austin Riley to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Shea Langeliers out at 2nd. Brent Rooker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Lawrence Butler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler grounds out to pitcher Raisel Iglesias.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Luis Severino picks off Ronald Acuña Jr. at 1st on throw to first baseman Andy Ibáñez.
